zh.Ousefleet, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾武瑟福利特
zh.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire是Gerard Ufflete和Ada的兒子，於1335年出生在英國越可爾吉福特。他於1357年與Margaret Thornhill結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1406年在英國越可爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.Ousefleet, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾武瑟福利特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire是Gerard Ufflete和Ada的儿子，于1335年出生在英国越可爾吉福特。他于1357年与Margaret Thornhill结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1406年在英国越可爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire was born in 1335, in Whitgift, Yorkshire, England as the son of Gerard Ufflete and Ada. He married Margaret Thornhill in 1357. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1406, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire est né en 1335, à Whitgift, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Gerard Ufflete et Ada. Il a épousé Margaret Thornhill en 1357. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1406, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire wurde 1335 in Whitgift, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Gerard Ufflete und Ada geboren. Er hat 1357 Margaret Thornhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1406 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire è nato il nel 1335 nel Whitgift, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Gerard Ufflete e Ada. Lui sposato Margaret Thornhill nel 1357. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1406, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshireは1335年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトジフトでGerard UffleteとAdaの息子として生まれた。1357年にMargaret Thornhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1406年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire(은)는 1335년 영국 요르크실르 휘트지프트에서 Gerard Ufflete(와)과 Ada의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1357년 Margaret Thornhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년 영국 요르크실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire nasceu em 1335, em Whitgift, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Gerard Ufflete e Ada. Ele casou-se com Margaret Thornhill em 1357. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1406, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire родился в 1335 г. в местности уитгифт, еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Gerard Ufflete и Ada. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Thornhill в 1357 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1406 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Gerard Usflete Sheriff of Yorkshire nació en 1335, en Whitgift, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Gerard Ufflete y Ada. Se casó con Margaret Thornhill en 1357. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1406, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
